name: live-price-chart
title: Live Price Chart
description: Canvas-based real-time price chart for prediction markets. Append PricePoint[] from a WebSocket subscription. Key props: symbol (string, e.g. 'BTC'), prices (PricePoint[]), currentPrice (number), targetPrice? (number), height? (number). No hook required — build price array manually from allMids or l2Book subscription.
author: Purrdict <https://purrdict.xyz>
